positive: A stylized, minimal illustration of a soaring mountain silhouette at sunrise. The scene features layered mountain ranges in deep indigo and cool gray, contrasting sharply against a vibrant gradient sky of coral pink, soft lavender, and bright orange. Incorporate abstract celestial elements, such as delicate gold foil constellations and wispy clouds. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, designed for print on clothing. Use clean lines, flat design aesthetic with high contrast, and an ethereal, majestic mood. Vector art style, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, watermark, text, signature, grainy, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, gradient background
